summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nivant Lodge overhaul features. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 13 features verified. Major changes from 'Digital Register Hotel' to 'Nivant Lodge' working correctly.

minor.issue: Current billing has 5-hour grace period (line 296-300). Requirements state 'no grace period - overstay = full day charge'. May need clarification if this is intentional.

issues: Shows 'निवांत लॉज' (Marathi) by default - this is correct behavior as app defaults to Marathi language. English 'Nivant Lodge' shows when language is toggled.

passed_tests: Backend: Owner login (admin@hotel.com / admin123) - 200 OK
Backend: Staff login (staff@hotel.com / staff123) - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/rooms returns 22 rooms
Backend: Standard rooms (101,102,201-203,301-303) at ₹600
Backend: Non-AC Deluxe rooms (103,105-107) at ₹1000
Backend: Room 104 special rate ₹500
Backend: AC Deluxe rooms (204-206,304-306,404-406) at ₹1200
Backend: GET /api/settings returns hotel_name='Nivant Lodge'
Backend: Settings contain checkout rules
Backend: POST /api/bookings/fresh creates booking with total_amount=200, booking_type='fresh'
Backend: Check-in sends 3 WhatsApp messages (welcome, wifi, rules)
Backend: Aadhar stored unmasked (full number)
Backend: Face photo stored in guest record
Backend: Staff cannot access POST /api/rooms/manage (403)
Backend: Staff cannot access POST /api/channels (403)
Backend: Owner can access POST /api/rooms/manage
Backend: GET /api/bookings/history returns paginated results
Frontend: Login page shows 'Nivant Lodge' (निवांत लॉज in Marathi)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Nivant Lodge' title
Frontend: Room grid shows 22 rooms with correct types (DLX, AC DLX badges)
Frontend: Room rates displayed correctly (₹600, ₹500, ₹1000, ₹1200)
Frontend: Fresh Service section with room buttons (30 min · ₹200)
Frontend: Fresh Service modal opens correctly
Frontend: Check-in page has Booking Source selector (Walk-in + OTAs)
Frontend: Check-in page has Primary Phone input
Frontend: Check-in page has WhatsApp Number input
Frontend: Check-in page has Copy button for phone
Frontend: Check-in page has Face Photo capture button
Frontend: Check-in page has Aadhar scan button
Frontend: Galla page has 'Add Expense' button
Frontend: Galla page has 'Shift Handover' button
Frontend: Galla page has NO voice button (correctly removed)
critical_code_review_comments: Billing grace period: Current code has 5-hour grace (line 296-300 in server.py). Requirements say 'no grace period'. Clarify if this needs change.
Room type badge display: Standard rooms don't show badge (only DLX and AC DLX shown). This is intentional per code logic in DashboardPage.js line 215-219.

mocked_apis.WhatsApp Business API: Messages logged to DB with 'mocked_sent' status
mocked_apis.Aadhar OCR: Simulated - fills fixed demo data (Rajesh Kumar Patil)
mocked_apis.OTA Channel Sync: Simulated - creates random bookings from active channels

seed_data_creation: 22 Nivant Lodge rooms seeded with correct types and rates. Hotel settings seeded with hotel_name='Nivant Lodge'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nivant Lodge overhaul fully tested. All 13 features from requirements verified: 1) Room layout with 22 rooms (STD ₹600, Non-AC DLX ₹1000, Room 104 ₹500, AC DLX ₹1200), 2) Hotel settings with Nivant Lodge name, 3) Fresh Service (30 min ₹200), 4) WhatsApp auto-send (3 messages), 5) Aadhaar unmasked, 6) Face photo capture, 7) Primary phone + WhatsApp number + Copy button, 8) Booking source selector, 9) Voice button removed from Galla, 10) Emergent branding hidden via CSS, 11) Login shows Nivant Lodge, 12) Role-based access (staff gets 403), 13) Booking history paginated.

features_verified.hotel_settings: ✓ hotel_name='Nivant Lodge', rules include checkout time
